title: Artemis II broke Fred Haise's distance record, but he is happy to pass it on
description: "It wasn't a big deal. It just coincided with the fact that Moon was farther away from the Earth."

title: Palantir employees are talking about company's "descent into fascism"
description: Slack messages, interviews with current and former works paint picture of company in turmoil.

title: Discord Sleuths Gained Unauthorized Access to Anthropic’s Mythos
description: Plus: Spy firms tap into a global telecom weakness to track targets, 500,000 UK health records go up for sale on Alibaba, Apple patches a revealing notification bug, and more.

title: Ace the Ping-Pong Robot Can Whup Your Ass
description: Ace can read the trajectory of a ball, adjust the racket angle, and respond with strokes that keep the exchange alive with real players.

title: This is who's developing Golden Dome's orbital interceptors—if they're ever built
description: "If boost-phase intercept from space is not affordable and scalable, we will not produce it."

title: Google will invest as much as $40 billion in Anthropic
description: This follows a similar, but smaller, investment by Amazon just days ago.

title: Three reasons why DeepSeek’s new model matters
description: On Friday, Chinese AI firm DeepSeek released a preview of V4, its long-awaited new flagship model. Notably, the model can process much longer prompts than its last generation, thanks to a new design that helps it handle large amounts of text more efficiently. title: Europe—not US—first to authorize Moderna's combo mRNA flu-COVID vaccine
description: Amid RFK Jr.'s anti-vaccine agenda, Moderna withdrew its FDA application last year.

title: Meta’s loss is Thinking Machines’ gain
description: Meta has been poaching talent from Thinking Machines Lab. But it's a two-way street.

title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
description: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.

title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
description: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.

title: Apple’s new CEO, and why Elon Musk wants to buy Cursor for $60B

title: AI-Designed Drugs by a DeepMind Spinoff Are Headed to Human Trials
description: Isomorphic Labs president Max Jaderberg said at WIRED Health in London that the startup has built a “broad and exciting pipeline of new medicines.”

title: Marked-up Mac minis flood eBay amid shortages driven by AI
description: Apple’s sold-out Mac mini is spawning marked-up eBay listings as demand surges for the compact desktop, now favored for running local AI models and tools.

title: Apple's Next CEO Needs to Launch a Killer AI Product
description: Tim Cook was a great CEO, but he didn’t crack AI.  It’s job number 1 for John Ternus.

title: The Download: supercharged scams and studying AI healthcare
description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. title: These AI Thirst Trap Creators Say They’re Misunderstood
description: A viral red carpet moment shone light on a group of hunky Instagram influencers—and the followers who are too horny to care that they’re not real.

title: Health-care AI is here. We don’t know if it actually helps patients.
description: I don’t need to tell you that AI is everywhere. Or that it is being used, increasingly, in hospitals. Doctors are using AI to help them with notetaking. title: The Download: introducing the Nature issue
description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Introducing: the Nature issue When we talk about “nature,” we usually mean something untouched by humans. But little of that world exists today.

title: Will fusion power get cheap? Don’t count on it.
description: Fusion power could provide a steady, zero-emissions source of electricity in the future—if companies can get plants built and running. title: Understanding Convolutions on Graphs
description: Understanding the building blocks and design choices of graph neural networks.

title: A Gentle Introduction to Graph Neural Networks
description: What components are needed for building learning algorithms that leverage the structure and properties of graphs?

title: Distill Hiatus
description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

title: Adversarial Reprogramming of Neural Cellular Automata
description: Reprogramming Neural CA to exhibit novel behaviour, using adversarial attacks.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
